sidebar.emptyDescNew: Use the + on the left bar to light your first one.
sidebar.emptyDescChoose: Tap an icon on the left to open its channels.

more.title: More options
more.wishingHint: Suggest what to change in Astra

empty.lede: Pick an orbit on the side to enter a conversation, or tap the moon to open your whispers.
empty.aside: "Every conversation starts with a pause — this is yours."

composer.mentionHint: Tab/Enter to select · Esc to close

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Public constellations — find a community and join instantly.
discover.emptyDesc: Be the first: list yours in the server settings.

friends.lede: Each friendship here is an aligned star. Accept requests, send others, or align new ones by coordinate.
friends.emptyDesc: Add stars by username or coordinate.
friends.removeDesc: You'll no longer be friends. You can add them again later.
friends.alreadyFriends: Star aligned — you were already friends.
friends.coordinateHint: Ask for the Astra coordinate (shown on the profile — 6 hex chars with a hyphen).

dm.title: Whispers
dm.listEmptyDesc: Open someone's profile or accept a request to start.
dm.emptyLede: Pick a conversation on the left, or open someone's profile to start a dialogue.
dm.emptyAside: Whispers — only you and them read them.

MANAGE_ROLES.label: Manage roles
MANAGE_ROLES.desc: Create/edit roles (always belongs to the owner)

toast.inviteRegenerated: Invite link regenerated. Old links no longer work.

overview.iconHint: PNG, JPG, GIF or WebP · 5MB max · GIF animates on hover/active
overview.bannerDesc: Shows at the top of the channel list and on the invite page. Without a banner, the name's signature constellation takes over.
overview.bannerHint: PNG, JPG, GIF or WebP (animated ok) · 8MB max · ideal 600×200+
overview.discoveryDesc: List your constellation in the public directory — anyone can find it and join without an invite.
overview.name: — IV. Name
overview.inviteDesc: Anyone with this link can join. To revoke access, regenerate the code.
overview.regenTooltip: Generates a new code — invalidates the current one
overview.regenAdminOnly: Only admins can regenerate the code.
overview.retentionDesc: Set how long messages are kept. After the period, they're automatically deleted along with attachments.
overview.retentionWorker: Worker runs 1×/h · next purge catches everything older than {{days}}d
overview.deleteDesc: Permanent action. All channels, messages and members will be removed.

regen.title: Regenerate invite link?
regen.desc: Anyone with the old link will NO LONGER be able to join. Use this if the link leaked or you want to revoke it.

members.title: — Members
members.banDesc: A ban is permanent until unbanned. The reason appears in the audit log.

roles.title: — Roles
roles.empty: No roles yet. Create the first one.
roles.deleteDesc: Members with this role lose associated permissions. Not reversible.
roles.name: Name
roles.hoist: Display separately in the member list (hoist)
roles.memberRolesDesc: Check to assign, uncheck to remove.
roles.noRolesYet: No roles created yet — go to the Roles tab.

emojis.title: Custom emojis
emojis.desc: Up to 50 per server. PNG/JPG/WebP/GIF up to 512KB — recompressed to WebP 128×128. Use in chat as
emojis.name: Name

bans.title: — Bans
bans.empty: Nobody banned. Bans show up here.

channels.title: — Channels
channels.empty: No channels. Create the first one.
channels.deleteDesc: All messages in this channel will be lost. Permanent action.
channels.visibilityDesc: A private channel is hidden from everyone except selected roles (and the owner).
channels.rolesCanSee: Roles that can see this channel:
channels.noRoles: No roles created. Go to the Roles tab.
channels.newDesc: Choose a name and type. Text for chat, voice for calls.

badges.empty: No badges yet. Create the first one above.
badges.deleteDesc: Removes the badge from everyone who has it. Not reversible.

inviteFriends.title: Invite friend
inviteFriends.noFriends: You don't have any friends on Astra yet.
inviteFriends.allMembers: All your friends are already members.
inviteFriends.noMatch: No friend found for that filter.

account.title: Account
account.description: Your Astra sign-in credentials. Avatar, banner and bio live in Profile.
account.displayNameHint: How others see you in chat.
account.emailHint: Used for login. Never shown publicly.
account.passwordHintHas: Change it periodically. Min. 8 characters, 1 uppercase and 1 number.
account.passwordHintNone: Your account uses Google sign-in — no local password.
account.appLockHint: Asks for your biometrics when opening the app. This device only.
account.logoutSessionHint: Revokes this token. Other sessions on other devices stay active.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: The identity other members see. Visual styling is in Customization.
profile.formatError: Unsupported format. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF.
profile.pronounsHint: E.g. she/her, he/him, they/them. Shows as a chip on your card.
profile.statusHint: Emoji + short phrase your friends see. Clears when you change or delete it.
profile.customStatusPlaceholder: E.g. Reading a book · Compiling · BRB
profile.bioHint: Up to 300 characters. Markdown: **bold** · *italic* · `code` · [text](url) · line break.

customization.title: Customization
customization.description: Your profile's visual look — banner, theme, font, text color. All auto-saved.
customization.bannerHint: Large image at the top of your profile. Tune background, position and border in separate tabs.
customization.adjustHelp: Drag the image vertically to choose which part shows. Zoom slider: 50% shows the whole banner (bg fills around it) · 200% is max close-up.
customization.adjustLocked: Upload an image in the Background tab to unlock position and zoom adjustment.
customization.themeHint: Background gradient of the card shown when someone opens your profile.
customization.fontHint: Typeface for your name on the profile card and in chat messages. 8 curated families.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the interface colors. Changes show up instantly.
appearance.quickThemeHint: Pre-thought color + background combos. You can still adjust each individually below.
appearance.accentHint: Used on buttons, links, hover and active elements.
appearance.backgroundHint: Base tone of the app. Affects every screen.
appearance.fontSizeHint: Scales the WHOLE UI (rem-based). Handy for large/small screens.
appearance.messageSpacingHint: Compact = more messages visible; Spacious = more breathing room.
appearance.reduceMotionHint: Lessens or removes UI motion. Handy on modest machines or for vestibular sensitivity.

nameColors.title: Server colors
nameColors.description: Customize your name color in each server. Server roles override this choice.
nameColors.noServers: You're not a member of any server.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Decide what interrupts you — and when.
notifications.pushHint: Get alerts even with Astra closed — depends on the browser allowing it.
notifications.unsupported: Browser doesn't support push (iOS Safari requires adding to home screen).
notifications.serverDisabled: Push is temporarily unavailable on the server. In-app notifications keep working.
notifications.deniedNative: Allow notifications for Astra in Android settings (Apps → Astra → Notifications).
notifications.deniedWeb: Allow notifications in the site settings in your browser and reload.
notifications.nativeManage: To disable, use Android's notification settings (per channel: mentions, whispers, activity).
notifications.typesHint: Each type can be toggled independently.
notifications.repliesHint: When someone replies to your msg
notifications.reactionsHint: When someone reacts to your msg
notifications.soundHint: Plays a short sound per type (higher for mention, lower for DM).
notifications.mutedThisDevice: Global sound muted on this device
notifications.quietHint: During this window, notifications still appear in the bell — they just don't play sound or show a pop-up.
notifications.toastPermDenied: Permission denied — allow it in your browser settings.
notifications.testBody: If you see this, browser notifications work.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Devices where you're signed in to Astra. Revoke any if you suspect unauthorized access.
sessions.activeHint: Auto-renews on each use. Inactive for 30 days → expires.
sessions.endOthersHint: Revokes all sessions except the current one. Use it if you changed your password or suspect unauthorized access.
sessions.logoutSessionHint: Just this token. The others stay.

data.title: Data
data.description: Control over your personal data — export, import, delete.
data.exportHint: Downloads a .json file with messages, profile and settings.
data.deleteAccountHint: Permanently deletes your account and all sent messages. This action can't be undone.

wishing.title: Wishing Star
wishing.description: Suggest what to change in Astra. Each wish is a star everyone can see — read others, comment on yours.
wishing.placeholder: I think it'd be cool if…
wishing.rules: Text only. Markdown becomes plain text. Public list — choose your words well.
wishing.empty: No stars yet. Be the first.
wishing.sent: ✦ Your star was hung in the sky.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose how the app speaks to you. We're translating Astra screen by screen — more languages are on the way.
